messages.content: please rewrite and expand below content: In my current and previous working history (from 04/2014 till now), I both have solid experience in delivering a wide range of human resources services to local-engaged staff including the onboarding procedure, social benefits, on-job training, and annual medical check-up. As a Junior HR assitant to Senior HR specilist, it is my main job responsibility to offer first hand HR related information to both local and expat staff during their employmenmt circle.

Throughout my career, which spans from April 2014 until now, I have gained valuable experience in providing a comprehensive range of human resources services to local employees. This includes overseeing the onboarding process, managing social benefits, conducting on-the-job training, and coordinating annual medical check-ups. As a Junior HR Assistant reporting to the Senior HR Specialist, it is my primary role to ensure that both local and expatriate staff receive timely and accurate HR-related information throughout their employment journey. I take pride in being a reliable point of contact for all HR-related queries and strive to support the company in fostering a positive and productive work environment for all employees.

rewrite and expand below content:

Throughout my career, which spans from April 2014 until now, I have gained valuable experience in providing a comprehensive range of human resources services to local employees. This includes overseeing the onboarding process, managing social benefits, conducting on-the-job training, and coordinating annual medical check-ups. As a Junior HR Specilist in 2014 to the Senior HR Specialist between 07/2017 and 08/2022, even as a HR Supervisor since last May, it is my primary role to ensure that both local and expatriate staff receive timely and accurate HR-related information throughout their employment journey. I take pride in being a reliable point of contact for all HR-related queries and strive to support the company in fostering a positive and productive work environment for all employees.

Over the course of my career, spanning from April 2014 to the present day, I have accumulated extensive experience in delivering a broad spectrum of human resources services to local employees. This encompasses overseeing the entire onboarding process, administering social benefits, providing on-the-job training, and organizing annual medical check-ups. As I progressed from the role of Junior HR Specialist in 2014 to Senior HR Specialist from July 2017 to August 2022, and currently as a HR Supervisor since May of last year, my primary responsibility has been to ensure that both local and expatriate staff receive accurate and timely HR-related information throughout their employment journey.

I take great pride in being a dependable point of contact for all HR-related inquiries and am committed to supporting the company in cultivating a positive and productive work environment for all employees. With my wealth of experience, I have developed a deep understanding of the intricacies of human resources management and continue to seek opportunities to enhance and optimize HR processes for the benefit of the organization and its staff members.

rewrite and expand more details for below contenty:

As a Senior HR Specialist at Benenden Bilingual School Guangzhou (BBSG), between 02/2022-08/2022 I assisted my Department Director on conducting a comprehensive analysis of the company’s medium and long-term strategic manpower plans to create detailed human resource plans aligning with the current workforce situation.

During my tenure as a Senior HR Specialist at Benenden Bilingual School Guangzhou (BBSG) from February 2022 to August 2022, my role involved collaborating closely with the Department Director to conduct a thorough analysis of the company's medium and long-term strategic manpower plans. This process entailed evaluating the current workforce situation and aligning it with the organization's overall strategic objectives. 

My responsibilities included developing detailed human resource plans that focused on forecasting future workforce needs, identifying key skills and competencies required, and implementing effective talent acquisition and retention strategies. I worked diligently to ensure that the human resource plans were closely integrated with the company's broader business goals, thereby contributing to the overall success and growth of the organization.

Furthermore, I actively participated in identifying opportunities for talent development and succession planning, aiming to build a strong pipeline of internal talent to support the company's future growth initiatives. By leveraging my expertise in human resources management and strategic planning, I was able to make significant contributions to shaping and optimizing the workforce structure at BBSG, ultimately enhancing the organization's competitive advantage in the market.

rewrite: Over the course of my career, spanning from April 2014 to the present day, I have accumulated extensive experience in delivering a broad spectrum of human resources services to local employees. This encompasses overseeing the entire onboarding process, administering social benefits, providing on-the-job training, and organizing annual medical check-ups. As I progressed from the role of Junior HR Specialist in 2014 to Senior HR Specialist from July 2017 to August 2022, and currently as a HR Supervisor since May of last year, my primary responsibility has been to ensure that both local and expatriate staff receive accurate and timely HR-related information throughout their employment journey.

Take my current role as a great example, from the early begining of the hiring process, I keep close contact with the candidate in regards to interview arrangment, once the management confirm his/her offer, I will take full charge of the onboarding process, such as arranging medical check, reference check, and before his/her first day, I will send him/her with the schedule of work arrangement so that what he/she will expect on the onboard day. I will provide thoughout orientation training of the school and adminstrative operation process and responsible for completing the rest of paper work within one week

Throughout my career, which stretches from April 2014 to the present, I have amassed a wealth of experience in providing a comprehensive range of human resources services to local employees. This includes overseeing the entire onboarding process, managing social benefits, conducting on-the-job training, and coordinating annual medical check-ups. Transitioning from the role of Junior HR Specialist in 2014 to Senior HR Specialist from July 2017 to August 2022, and currently serving as an HR Supervisor since May of the previous year, my main focus has always been ensuring that both local and expatriate staff receive accurate and timely HR-related information throughout their employment journey.

Taking my current position as a prime illustration, I am deeply involved in every step of the hiring process. From the initial stages of arranging interviews, to managing the onboarding process once an offer is extended and accepted. This involves coordinating medical checks, conducting reference checks, and providing new hires with a detailed schedule of their first day. I take charge of organizing orientation training sessions, covering both school-specific policies and administrative procedures, to facilitate a smooth transition for new employees. Additionally, I am responsible for completing all remaining paperwork within the first week of their employment, ensuring that they have all the necessary tools and information to thrive in their new role.

please simplified below: 

•	Optimized staff management procedures for roles like school doctor, teaching assistant, and early years educator by identifying areas for enhancement and implementing standardized protocols to improve efficiency.
•	Successfully recruited and oversaw expat teachers at Ersha and Huadu campuses, offering comprehensive support throughout the onboarding process and aiding in their successful integration into their new positions. Maintained a recruitment rate of up to 5 candidates per month consistently.
•	Managed documentation processes for work visas, work certificates, domestic and international work permits, and other essential paperwork for a team of 10 foreign teachers.
•	Oversaw smooth staff transitions, including those of overseas educators, to new roles, providing support to department heads in delivering performance feedback and conducting regular evaluations to boost employee motivation.
•	Collaborated with department heads to ensure effective communication between foreign teachers and other staff members, facilitating the seamless transfer of information to meet the needs of stakeholders within the school.
•	Developed a customized background check process to gather and verify new hires’ personal information, educational qualifications, and work experience, including contacting previous employers for feedback and preparing comprehensive reports for hiring decisions.
•	Regularly reviewed organizational performance to enhance the performance management system and streamline annual processes. Gathered and summarized data for each department/position while maintaining employee records.
•	Engaged in employee engagement activities by conducting regular interviews (2-3 times per semester) to assess employee needs and provide support in care and training activities.

• Improved staff management procedures for various roles like school doctor, teaching assistant, and early years educator by identifying areas for enhancement and implementing standardized protocols for increased efficiency.

• Managed essential documentation processes for work visas, work certificates, domestic and international work permits, and other paperwork for a team of 10 foreign teachers.

• Collaborated with department heads to ensure effective communication between foreign teachers and other staff members, ensuring seamless information transfer to meet school stakeholders' needs.
• Developed a tailored background check process to gather and verify new hires' personal information, educational qualifications, and work experience, including contacting previous employers for feedback and preparing comprehensive reports for hiring decisions.
• Regularly reviewed organizational performance to enhance the performance management system and streamline annual processes, collecting and summarizing data for each department/position while maintaining employee records.
• Engaged in employee engagement activities by conducting regular interviews (2-3 times per semester) to assess employee needs and provide support in care and training initiatives.

simplified:

•	Oversaw human resource operations for a staff of approximately 3,000 full-time employees and 500 interns.
•	Actively participated in annual campus recruitment events at prestigious universities, including South China University of Technology and Guangdong University of Technology. Coordinated all recruitment activities, from scheduling meetings to conducting interviews, resulting in the recruitment of around 100 interns annually.
•	Managed onboarding, resignation, and position change procedures for local and international employees, as well as interns. Regularly reviewed employee files, ensured data accuracy, and handled employment procedures, including visa applications for foreign employees.
•	Designed and implemented comprehensive onboarding training programs for new employees and interns. Developed training plans and courses to facilitate the transfer of knowledge regarding employee manuals, human resources systems, and processes. Conducted over 10 annual training sessions engaging approximately 400 individuals.
•	Oversaw staff attendance and conducted detailed audits of overtime applications. Regularly analysed attendance and overtime data, providing support to the Compensation and Benefits team for accurate salary calculations.
•	Compiled and analysed data related to recruitment, onboarding, and resignation processes. Generated detailed recruitment analysis reports and HR data reports, offering valuable insights for future HR planning.
•	Supported the GM of the South China Region in organizing global business meetings and annual conferences for account managers in Northeast Asia. Acted as an interpreter, facilitating communication with foreign guests and stakeholders from headquarters.
•	Led the establishment and modification of HR-related systems and processes. Streamlined key processes such as resignation, onboarding, destination surveys, and training management to enhance operational efficiency.

• Managed HR operations for a team of around 3,000 full-time employees and 500 interns.
• Engaged in annual campus recruitment drives at prestigious universities like South China University of Technology and Guangdong University of Technology. Oversaw all recruitment activities, from scheduling meetings to conducting interviews, resulting in the recruitment of about 100 interns per year.
• Handled onboarding, resignations, and job change procedures for both local and international staff, as well as interns. Ensured data accuracy in employee files, managed employment procedures, and processed visa applications for foreign employees.
• Developed and implemented comprehensive onboarding training programs for new staff and interns. Created training plans and courses to transfer knowledge on employee manuals, HR systems, and processes. Conducted over 10 training sessions annually involving around 400 individuals.
• Monitored staff attendance and conducted thorough audits of overtime requests. Analyzed attendance and overtime data regularly, assisting the Compensation and Benefits team in accurate salary calculations.
• Compiled and analyzed data on recruitment, onboarding, and resignation processes. Produced detailed reports on recruitment analysis and HR data, providing insights for future HR planning.
• Assisted the GM of the South China Region in organizing global business meetings and annual conferences for account managers in Northeast Asia. Served as an interpreter to facilitate communication with foreign guests and headquarters stakeholders.
• Led the implementation and improvement of HR systems and processes. Streamlined key procedures such as resignations, onboarding, destination surveys, and training management to enhance operational efficiency.

rewrite: During my tenure as a Senior HR Specialist at SGS Guangzhou Branch from July 2017 to February 2022, I gained valuable experience working within an internationally recognized company specializing in testing, inspection, and certification services. SGS, established in Rouen, France in 1878, expanded its operations to China in 1991, showcasing its global presence and reputation.

Additionally, I have been associated with renowned academic institutions in Guangzhou, including Benenden Bilingual School Guangzhou and Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten (formerly known as Trinity International Kindergarten). These institutions are well-known for their academic excellence and contributions to education in the region.

While my experience primarily lies within the corporate sector, collaborating with SGS, and with academic institutions known for their international standards, has provided me with exposure to diverse working environments and an understanding of global business practices and standards.

During my time as a Senior HR Specialist at SGS Guangzhou Branch from July 2017 to February 2022, I gained valuable experience in a globally recognized company that specializes in testing, inspection, and certification services. SGS, founded in Rouen, France in 1878, expanded its operations to China in 1991, demonstrating its extensive global reach and esteemed reputation.

Furthermore, I have also worked closely with prestigious educational institutions in Guangzhou, such as Benenden Bilingual School Guangzhou and Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten (formerly Trinity International Kindergarten). These schools are renowned for their academic excellence and significant contributions to the educational landscape in the region.

While my background primarily revolves around the corporate sector, my engagements with SGS and reputable academic institutions have exposed me to diverse work settings and fostered an appreciation for global business practices and standards.

how to adjust my cover letter:

I am writing to express my strong interest in the Administration Officer / Common Services Officer - Guangzhou at your esteemed institution. After carefully reviewing the requirements of the role, I believe that my skills, capabilities, and experience are a perfect match for this opportunity.

I hold a Master’s degree in International Business Management, with a specialization in Human Resource Management from the University of Tasmania. This educational background has equipped me with the necessary knowledge to tackle the talent acquisition challenges faced by academic institutions. Over the course of my career, I have gained valuable experience in various industries including TIC, consulting, finance, commerce, and tourism, both in foreign and private enterprises. This exposure has provided me with a comprehensive understanding of HR workflows and systems, enabling me to effectively manage tasks such as overseas recruitment, training, performance appraisal, and employee relations.

What sets me apart from other candidates is my fluency in English, Cantonese, and Mandarin. This linguistic advantage allows me to effectively communicate with individuals from diverse backgrounds and nationalities, facilitating smooth and efficient HR operations. Furthermore, I am committed to continuous learning and self-improvement, actively keeping up-to-date with the latest human resource laws and regulations.

In terms of personal characteristics, I am outgoing, open-minded, and detail-oriented, which makes me an ideal fit for the posted role. I thrive in collaborative team environments and possess excellent communication and coordination skills. Moreover, I excel under pressure and approach challenges with unwavering determination and enthusiasm.

I am incredibly excited about the opportunity to contribute my skills and expertise to your organization. I strongly believe that my experience and personal qualities make me the perfect fit for this role. I would welcome the chance to discuss my qualifications in more depth and explore how I can contribute to your team’s success.

Thank you for considering my application. Kindly find my attached resume for your perusal. I would greatly appreciate the opportunity to discuss my suitability for the position further.

when the duties are :

Provide services to the property business line including maintenance of the office building, staff quarters and other properties, procurement, and management of property assets  

Provide contracting services including procurement of goods or services up to the mission’s delegated authority. Manage the inventory of materials including stationery, furniture, office machinery and other office assets 

Coordinate mission’s transportation services, oversee the effective maintenance of the mission vehicle 

Manage the budget report and prepare regular forecasts on a monthly basis. Maintain a good record of budget expenditures 

Provides services in line with corporate financial responsibilities. Deliver a wide range of human resources services to local-engaged staff including the onboarding procedure, social benefits, on-job training, and annual medical check-up  

Liaise closely with the local government such as Foreign Affairs Office and Customs regarding the application and administration of diplomatic privileges 

Provide logistics coordination for mission hospitality and team-building events and for other events as needed 

Supervise staff and perform other duties under the various business lines as needed

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my keen interest in the Administration Officer / Common Services Officer position at your esteemed institution in Guangzhou. Having carefully reviewed the job requirements, I am confident that my skills, expertise, and experience align perfectly with this role.

With a Master's degree in International Business Management specialized in Human Resource Management from the University of Tasmania, I am well-equipped to address the talent acquisition challenges that academic institutions face. My professional journey spans various industries including TIC, consulting, finance, commerce, and tourism, in both foreign and private enterprises. This diverse background has honed my understanding of HR workflows and systems, enabling me to proficiently manage tasks like overseas recruitment, training, performance evaluation, and employee relations.

What distinguishes me is my proficiency in English, Cantonese, and Mandarin. This multilingual ability enables me to effectively communicate with individuals from different backgrounds and nationalities, facilitating seamless HR operations. Moreover, I am dedicated to continual learning, ensuring I stay abreast of the latest HR laws and regulations.

In terms of personal attributes, I am outgoing, detail-oriented, and open-minded – qualities that are ideally suited for the outlined role. Thriving in collaborative team environments, I possess exceptional communication and coordination skills. I excel under pressure, approaching challenges with unwavering determination and enthusiasm.

I am enthusiastic about the opportunity to contribute my knowledge and skills to your organization. I firmly believe that my experience and personal traits make me a strong candidate for this role. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my qualifications further and explore how I can add value to your team's success.

Thank you for considering my application. Please find my resume attached for your review. I would greatly appreciate the chance to discuss my suitability for the position in more detail.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
